friendly_name: Test Stabilization: Pre-Existing Failure Cluster Fix
purpose_context: During mission test-stabilization-and-debt-pass-01KSF9HJ, 90 pre-existing ('C99') test failures were deferred into ten sub-issues (#1301–#1310). This mission addresses five of those: #1303 (charter synthesizer manifest hash non-determinism and PathGuard chokepoint gaps), #1304 (doctrine glossary missing anchors and invalid tactic schema), #1305 (next CLI exit-code contract regressions), #1307 (charter integration suite failures), and the 8 residual sub-failures from #1310 (auth transport exit code, invocation JSON noise, WP Pydantic validation, mypy strict, implement base-flag plumbing, and mission switching). The goal is a measurably smaller failing test count and all five GitHub issues closed.
purpose_tldr: Resolve five clusters of pre-existing test failures across charter synthesizer, doctrine/glossary, next CLI, charter integration, and auth/invocation/mypy subsystems.
